name: Agentic AI Deep Dive
description: Deep dive into agentic AI architecture

content.title: Why Agentic AI Changes Everything
content.text:
Traditional AI: You ask, it answers.
Agentic AI: You describe a goal, it figures out how to achieve it.

The difference is profound. In MeshWeaver, we've built an architecture where AI agents can:

1. Plan multi-step workflows
2. Use tools and APIs autonomously
3. Collaborate with other agents
4. Learn from feedback

This isn't just chatbots with more steps - it's a fundamental shift in how we build software.

Read our technical deep dive: [link]

#AgenticAI #SoftwareArchitecture #AI
content.author: rbuergi@systemorph.com
